productDisplayName: Biba Women Green Churidar Kurta with Dupatta
description: Green kurta churidar set with dupattaGreen kurta, has a mandarin collar with a split V-neckline, press buttoned chest placket, embroidery on the placket, three quarter sleeves with tape and stitch detailing on the cuffs, stitch detailing on either sides of the placket till the hem, broad border with stitch and tape detailing and flock print and a vented hem Green churidar, has a drawstring waist and tapered legs Multicoloured printed dupatta with stitch detailing on the ends
